subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! All praise be unto God that through divine favors and merciful outpourings thou hast attained unto the recognition of the Manifestation of mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله الحمد لله بعنایات الهی و فیوضات رحمانی بعرفان مظهر اسرار فائز شدی
subcodes.subjects: @purpose; goal of creation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude
